title: calamagrostis neglecta
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta, also known as black needlegrass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis neglecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Calamagrostis neglecta typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or taken as tinctures.
